name: Create Markdown File
description: Create untitled.md in the selected folder.
script:
target="${1:-$PWD}"
if [ -f "$target" ]; then
  target="$(dirname "$target")"
fi

file="$target/untitled.md"
i=1
while [ -e "$file" ]; do
  file="$target/untitled-$i.md"
  i=$((i + 1))
done
printf "# Untitled\n" >"$file"
open -R "$file"
